name: gorstak-site
description: gorstak-site is a clean, modern portfolio website showcasing Gorstak's GitHub projects. Built with vanilla HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, it provides an elegant interface for browsing repositories with search and filtering capabilities.

name: GSecurity
description: Gorstak Windows OEM hardening & first-boot toolkit

name: GEDR
description: GEDR is a standalone Windows endpoint agent: it installs under C:\ProgramData\GEDR, runs as the GEDR Windows Service, and combines YARA rule scanning with behavioral and system monitoring jobs.

name: AMSIBypassDetection
description: AMSIBypassDetection monitors for techniques used to bypass the Windows Antimalware Scan Interface (AMSI), a critical security component that allows applications and services to scan scripts and code for malicious content.

name: Antivirus
description: Core antivirus components providing essential malware detection and protection capabilities.

name: GShield
description: GShield provides active, real-time protection against threats with automatic blocking and remediation capabilities.

name: PiHole
description: PiHole for Windows provides system-wide DNS filtering to block ads, trackers, and malicious domains. It uses Windows registry-based DNS configuration with massive blocklists to protect the entire system without requiring additional hardware.

name: Notes
description: This repository contains a collection of personal notes, guides, and writings by Gorstak. It serves as a knowledge repository covering diverse topics from technical guides to personal philosophy.

name: AsrRules
description: ASRRules applies Microsoft Defender Attack Surface Reduction rules to prevent common attack vectors including Office macro threats, script-based attacks, and credential theft.

name: MemoryScanning
description: MemoryScanning analyzes process memory for known malware signatures, shellcode patterns, unpacked malware, and other memory-resident threats.

name: Bookmarks
description: Bookmarks provides management and verification tools for browser bookmarks, including security validation and malicious URL detection.

name: Gorstak-Zadar
description: Gorstak-Zadar provides location-specific configurations, tools, and settings for operations in Zadar.

name: Zerch
description: Zerch provides advanced scanning capabilities to detect unknown malware, zero-day exploits, and emerging threats through behavioral analysis.

name: YoutubeAdsBlocker
description: YoutubeAdsBlocker blocks YouTube advertisements at the network level for system-wide ad-free YouTube experience.

name: YaraDetection
description: YaraDetection provides YARA rule-based scanning to identify malware families, packers, and suspicious patterns in files.

name: WMIPolicyProtection
description: WMIPolicyProtection hardens Windows Management Instrumentation (WMI) configuration to prevent malicious use and restricts WMI access.

name: WMIPhoneHomeDetection
description: WMIPhoneHomeDetection monitors for WMI-based command and control (C2) communication where attackers use WMI for stealthy communication.

name: WMIPersistenceDetection
description: WMIPersistenceDetection monitors Windows Management Instrumentation (WMI) for persistence mechanisms including event subscriptions and permanent event consumers.

name: WebcamGuardian
description: WebcamGuardian protects webcam privacy by monitoring for unauthorized access attempts and alerting when the camera is activated.

name: Vacuum
description: Vacuum is a system memory optimization tool similar to RamCleaner, designed to continuously free up RAM and improve system responsiveness. It provides automated memory management through Windows Task Scheduler integration.

name: USBMonitoring
description: USBMonitoring monitors USB device connections, autoruns, and badUSB attacks to prevent malware spread via removable media.

name: UniversalTime
description: UniversalTime maintains accurate system time synchronization for reliable security event timestamps and forensic analysis.

name: Unhooker
description: Unhooker detects API unhooking attempts where malware restores original API functions to bypass security monitoring.

name: Troll
description: Troll is a network security utility that continuously monitors for and removes unauthorized network bridges. It prevents network bridging attacks by automatically detecting and dismantling bridge configurations.

name: TokenManipulationDetection
description: TokenManipulationDetection monitors for Windows token manipulation attacks including token theft, impersonation, and privilege escalation.

name: TelemetryCorruption
description: TelemetryCorruption protects privacy by blocking, corrupting, or anonymizing telemetry data sent to Microsoft and third parties.

name: SysmonFull
description: SysmonFull provides complete integration with Microsoft Sysinternals Sysmon for comprehensive system monitoring and event logging.

name: SuiteHealth
description: SuiteHealth monitors the overall health, performance, and operational status of the Gorstak security suite components.

name: Stripper
description: Stripper removes sensitive metadata from documents, images, and other files to prevent information leakage before sharing files externally.

name: Store
description: Store provides security hardening and monitoring for Microsoft Store applications and the Windows Store environment.

name: Spoofer
description: Spoofer detects various spoofing attacks including MAC address spoofing, IP spoofing, and ARP spoofing attempts.

name: ShadowCopyMonitoring
description: ShadowCopyMonitoring monitors Volume Shadow Copy Service (VSS) to detect and prevent ransomware attempts to delete backup copies.

name: SessionTerminator
description: SessionTerminator manages user sessions and terminates unauthorized or suspicious sessions to prevent unauthorized access.

name: Services
description: Services provides service management utilities for configuring, securing, and maintaining Windows services.

name: ServiceMonitoring
description: ServiceMonitoring tracks Windows service installations, modifications, and suspicious service behavior to detect malware persistence.

name: SecurityPolicyHardening
description: SecurityPolicyHardening applies comprehensive Windows security policy hardening including password policies, audit policies, and user rights assignments.

name: Security
description: Security provides core security components and utilities for the Gorstak security framework.

name: SecureRemoteAccess
description: SecureRemoteAccess provides secure remote access configuration including proper authentication, encryption, and access controls.

name: Secpol
description: Secpol manages Windows local security policies including user rights, security options, and audit policies.

name: ScriptHostDetection
description: ScriptHostDetection monitors Windows Script Host (WSH) execution including wscript.exe and cscript.exe to detect malicious script execution.

name: ScriptContentScan
description: ScriptContentScan analyzes script files (PowerShell, VBScript, JavaScript) for malicious commands, obfuscation, and suspicious patterns.

name: ScreenSaver
description: ScreenSaver provides screen saver security including automatic screen locking, timeout enforcement, and secure screen saver configuration.

name: ScheduledTaskDetection
description: ScheduledTaskDetection monitors Windows Task Scheduler for malicious tasks including suspicious triggers, hidden tasks, and persistence mechanisms.

name: RootkitDetection
description: RootkitDetection hunts for rootkits and kernel-level malware using various detection techniques including memory analysis and behavioral checks.

name: Riddance
description: Riddance provides system cleanup capabilities for removing unwanted files, registry entries, and malware remnants.

name: Retaliate
description: Retaliate provides browser-focused network monitoring with active defense capabilities for suspicious network activity.

name: Restrictions
description: Restrictions enforces system restrictions and policy limitations to reduce attack surface and improve security posture.

name: ResponseEngine
description: ResponseEngine provides automated threat response capabilities including process termination, quarantine, and remediation actions.

name: RemoteAccessPrevention
description: RemoteAccessPrevention blocks unauthorized remote access by disabling remote desktop, remote registry, and other remote administration tools.

name: RegistryPersistenceDetection
description: RegistryPersistenceDetection monitors Windows registry for persistence mechanisms including Run keys, Services, and other auto-start locations.

name: ReflectiveDLLInjectionDetection
description: ReflectiveDLLInjectionDetection monitors for reflective DLL injection, a technique where malicious DLLs are loaded directly into memory without using Windows loader.

name: RealTimeFileMonitor
description: RealTimeFileMonitor provides real-time monitoring of file system changes using Windows file system notifications to detect unauthorized modifications.

name: RansomwareDetection
description: RansomwareDetection provides multi-layered detection of ransomware through behavioral analysis, file monitoring, and canary file detection.

name: RamCleaner
description: RamCleaner is a lightweight Windows utility that continuously frees up RAM by clearing working sets and standby lists. It uses Microsoft's Sysinternals EmptyStandbyList tool to optimize memory usage without affecting system stability.

name: Rainmeter
description: A collection of custom Rainmeter skins designed by Gorstak for desktop customization and system monitoring. These skins provide visual displays for system information, resource usage, and aesthetic desktop enhancements.

name: QuarantineManagement
description: QuarantineManagement provides secure quarantine capabilities for detected threats including encryption, isolation, and recovery options.

name: PUPDetection
description: PUPDetection identifies and removes Potentially Unwanted Programs including adware, spyware, and bundleware.

name: PUMDetection
description: PUMDetection monitors for Potentially Unwanted Modifications including browser homepage hijacks, search engine changes, and unauthorized proxy settings.

name: PUADetection
description: PUADetection identifies Potentially Unwanted Applications (PUA) including remote access tools, cryptocurrency miners, and other software that may be undesirable.

name: ProxyRotation
description: ProxyRotationDetection identifies proxy rotation techniques used to evade detection and maintain anonymity.

name: Provisioning
description: Provisioning automates the deployment and configuration of security components across systems.

name: ProcessHollowingDetection
description: ProcessHollowingDetection identifies process hollowing attacks where malware starts a legitimate process and replaces its memory with malicious code.

name: ProcessCreationDetection
description: ProcessCreationDetection monitors for newly created processes, analyzing parent-child relationships, command lines, and execution context for threats.

name: ProcessAuditing
description: ProcessAuditing enables Windows process creation auditing to log all process starts for security analysis and forensic investigation.

name: ProcessAnomalyDetection
description: ProcessAnomalyDetection uses behavioral scoring to identify suspicious processes based on characteristics like unsigned executables, unusual paths, and anomalous behavior patterns.

name: Privacy
description: Privacy is a comprehensive Windows privacy hardening toolkit that reduces telemetry, disables tracking features, and enhances user privacy through registry modifications and system tweaks.

name: PreventRemoteConnections
description: PreventRemoteConnections blocks unauthorized remote desktop, SSH, and other remote access connections to prevent unauthorized system access.

name: PnPDeviceTamperingDetection
description: PnPDeviceTamperingDetection monitors Plug and Play (PnP) device installations and modifications to detect unauthorized hardware changes and device-based attacks.

name: PerformanceTweaks
description: PerformanceTweaks optimizes Windows settings to balance security hardening with system performance, ensuring protection without excessive resource usage.

name: PDQ
description: PDQ provides integration with PDQ Deploy for automated security software deployment and management.

name: Patcher
description: Patcher provides utilities for applying security patches, hotfixes, and system updates to address vulnerabilities.

name: PasswordManagement
description: PasswordManagement provides secure password handling, storage, and management utilities with encryption and access controls.

name: Password
description: Password provides password security tools including strength analysis, policy enforcement, and password-related vulnerability detection.

name: Pac
description: Pac monitors Proxy Auto-Configuration (PAC) files for malicious modifications that could redirect traffic to attacker-controlled proxies.

name: Ozempic
description: Ozempic provides specialized detection capabilities for various code injection techniques used by malware and attackers.

name: NullSessionProtection
description: NullSessionProtection hardens Windows against null session attacks by disabling anonymous access and preventing unauthenticated SMB enumeration.

name: Null
description: Null provides protection against null session attacks by monitoring and blocking anonymous SMB sessions and other unauthenticated access attempts.

name: NetworkTrafficMonitor
description: NetworkTrafficMonitor provides real-time network traffic monitoring with protocol analysis, bandwidth tracking, and suspicious activity detection.

name: NetworkRepair
description: NetworkRepair provides tools for diagnosing and repairing network connectivity issues, resetting network configuration, and restoring network functionality.

name: NetworkDebloat
description: NetworkDebloat removes unnecessary network protocols, services, and components to reduce attack surface and improve network performance.

name: NetworkBridgeRemoval
description: NetworkBridgeRemoval detects and removes unauthorized network bridge configurations that could be used for traffic interception and man-in-the-middle attacks.

name: NetworkAnomalyDetection
description: NetworkAnomalyDetection analyzes network traffic patterns to detect anomalies including unusual connection volumes, data transfers, and behavioral changes.

name: Network
description: Network provides core network security components for traffic monitoring, connection analysis, and network-based threat detection.

name: NamedPipeMonitoring
description: NamedPipeMonitoring monitors Windows named pipes for malicious usage including Cobalt Strike default pipes, suspicious pipe names, and C2 communication channels.

name: MscScripts
description: MscScripts provides security-focused scripts and utilities leveraging Microsoft scripting technologies and frameworks.

name: Mp3ToMp4
description: Mp3ToMp4 provides media conversion capabilities for converting audio files to video format with visualizations or static images.

name: MobileDeviceMonitoring
description: MobileDeviceMonitoring monitors for mobile device connections including iOS and Android devices, detecting potential mobile malware indicators and unauthorized access.

name: MitreMapping
description: MitreMapping maps security detections to the MITRE ATT&CK framework, providing standardized threat classification and improved threat intelligence.

name: MiniFilterDrivers
description: MiniFilterDrivers monitors for suspicious minifilter driver installations that could be used to intercept filesystem operations, hide files, or perform other malicious activities.

name: Midas
description: Midas provides premium advanced security features including enhanced detection, automated response, and enterprise-grade protection capabilities.

name: MemoryAcquisitionDetection
description: MemoryAcquisitionDetection monitors for memory dumping attempts including use of ProcDump, task manager dumps, and other memory acquisition tools that could be used for credential theft.

name: Love4Free
description: Love4Free is a lightweight, free dating platform built with PHP and MySQL. It provides essential dating site functionality including user registration, profile creation, photo uploads, matching, and messaging - all without subscription fees.

name: LOLBinDetection
description: LOLBinDetection monitors for abuse of Living Off The Land Binaries (LOLBins) - legitimate Windows system tools that attackers abuse for malicious activities.

name: LocalProxyDetection
description: LocalProxyDetection monitors for unauthorized changes to system proxy settings, which can be used for traffic interception, man-in-the-middle attacks, and data exfiltration.

name: LNKProtection
description: LNKProtection monitors and protects against malicious LNK (shortcut) file attacks including forced execution, path traversal, and command injection via shortcuts.

name: LateralMovementDetection
description: LateralMovementDetection monitors for lateral movement techniques including PsExec, WMI remote execution, SMB abuse, and other methods attackers use to spread across networks.

name: KeyScramblerManagement
description: KeyScramblerManagement provides advanced management capabilities for KeyScrambler anti-keylogger software including configuration, monitoring, and policy enforcement.

name: KeyScrambler
description: KeyScrambler manages integration with KeyScrambler software to provide protection against keyloggers through keystroke encryption.

name: KeyloggerDetection
description: KeyloggerDetection identifies keylogging software and suspicious keyboard hooks that may be capturing keystrokes for malicious purposes.

name: KernelProcessPoll
description: KernelProcessPoll uses kernel-level interfaces to monitor process creation and termination with higher reliability than user-mode monitoring.

name: JetCleanup
description: JetCleanup provides fast system cleanup capabilities, removing temporary files, cache, and junk data to optimize storage and performance.

name: IPBlock
description: IPBlock manages IP address blocklists and automatically applies Windows Firewall rules to block known malicious IP addresses.

name: Initializer
description: Initializer sets up the security environment on system startup, applying baselines, checking configurations, and preparing the system for secure operation.

name: Infinity
description: Infinity provides persistent, continuous security monitoring designed to run indefinitely with automatic recovery and resilience features.

name: Immunity
description: Immunity provides system-level protections and immunizations against common vulnerabilities and attack techniques.

name: IdsDetection
description: IdsDetection provides IDS-style pattern matching on network traffic and system activity metadata to detect malicious patterns without deep packet inspection.

name: HoneypotMonitoring
description: HoneypotMonitoring provides advanced honeypot capabilities with detailed access logging, attacker behavior analysis, and threat intelligence generation.

name: HoneypotModule
description: HoneypotModule creates and monitors honeypot files and directories to detect unauthorized access, reconnaissance, and file system enumeration by attackers.

name: HidMacroGuard
description: HidMacroGuard monitors for malicious HID device attacks including Rubber Ducky-style keystroke injection and BadUSB attacks.

name: HeadersCheck
description: HeadersCheck validates file headers (magic bytes) against file extensions to detect renamed malicious files, packed executables, and suspicious file formats.

name: HashDetection
description: HashDetection verifies file SHA256 hashes against multiple threat intelligence sources to identify known malicious files.

name: Hardening
description: Hardening is a comprehensive security hardening toolkit for Windows systems and Active Directory environments. It provides automated scripts to configure password policies, credential protection, privileged access management, and system-wide security settings.

name: GVPN
description: GVPN provides secure VPN connection management with security monitoring and policy enforcement for VPN usage.

name: Guard
description: Guard monitors and controls system entry points, preventing unauthorized access and protecting critical system areas.

name: GTalk
description: GTalk is a simple Python-based chat system supporting peer-to-peer communication. It consists of a server for message relay, clients for user interaction, and peer-to-peer capability for direct connections.

name: GSecurityEnhanced
description: GSecurityEnhanced provides advanced security features beyond the standard GSecurity baseline, including enhanced monitoring and protection capabilities.

name: GSecurityBaseline
description: GSecurityBaseline provides comprehensive Windows security policy baselines for enterprise deployment. It includes pre-configured security templates, Local Group Policy Object (LGPO) tooling, and registry policy files for hardening Windows systems against common attack vectors. This project is designed for security administrators who need to rapi...

name: GS
description: GS provides a minimal installation path for core GSecurity components. It deploys essential security policies and LGPO configuration for rapid system hardening.

name: GRun
description: GRun provides secure application launching with sandboxing, privilege management, and security policy enforcement.

name: GRulesC2Block
description: GRulesC2Block downloads threat intelligence IP blocklists and automatically applies them to the Windows Firewall to block command and control (C2) servers.

name: GRules
description: GRules provides the core security rule engine and rule definitions for the Gorstak security framework.

name: GPrep
description: GPrep (Gorstak Preparation) is a comprehensive PowerShell-based system preparation and optimization tool designed for fresh Windows installations. It automates software installation via package managers, applies system tweaks, and optimizes Windows settings for performance and security. The tool includes both a command-line script and a Control ...

name: GPerf
description: GPerf provides performance optimization tools and monitoring capabilities for the Gorstak security suite.

name: GKodi
description: GKodi provides security hardening and monitoring for Kodi media center installations, protecting against malicious addons and unauthorized access.

name: GFocus
description: GFocus provides focus mode capabilities to minimize distractions while maintaining security monitoring in the background.

name: GeoBlockBypass
description: GeoBlockBypass monitors for VPN, proxy, and other tools used to bypass geographic content restrictions, useful for compliance monitoring.

name: GBrowser
description: GBrowser provides browser security components and management tools for the Gorstak security framework.

name: GamingScripts
description: GamingScripts is a collection of PowerShell and Python utilities designed to enhance gaming performance, manage game files, and optimize network settings for gaming.

name: GameCache
description: GameCache provides tools for managing game cache files, optimizing storage, and clearing unnecessary cached data from games.

name: FullScan
description: FullScan performs a comprehensive, deep system scan analyzing all files, processes, and system areas for malware, suspicious activity, and security issues.

name: FirewallRuleMonitoring
description: FirewallRuleMonitoring tracks changes to Windows Firewall rules, detecting unauthorized modifications that could indicate malware activity or security policy violations.

name: Firewall
description: Firewall provides tools for advanced Windows Firewall configuration, rule management, and traffic monitoring for enhanced network security.

name: FilelessDetection
description: FilelessDetection monitors for fileless malware techniques that execute directly in memory without writing files to disk, including PowerShell-based attacks and WMI execution.

name: FileEntropyDetection
description: FileEntropyDetection calculates Shannon entropy of files to identify packed, encrypted, or obfuscated content commonly used by malware to evade detection.

name: ExperienceNormalizer
description: ExperienceNormalizer applies consistent Windows user experience settings, removing variations that could be exploited or cause inconsistencies.

name: EventLogMonitoring
description: EventLogMonitoring analyzes Windows Event Logs to detect security events including login failures, privilege escalation, account changes, and audit log clearing.

name: ES
description: ES provides integration with Elasticsearch for security event forwarding, log aggregation, and security analytics.

name: ElfCatcher
description: ElfCatcher detects Linux ELF (Executable and Linkable Format) binaries running on Windows systems, often indicating WSL abuse or cross-platform malware.

name: EdrSelfProtection
description: EdrSelfProtection implements self-protection mechanisms to prevent malware from terminating, disabling, or tampering with the EDR/antivirus solution.

name: DriverWatcher
description: DriverWatcher monitors kernel driver loading events to detect Bring Your Own Vulnerable Driver (BYOVD) attacks, unsigned drivers, and suspicious driver installations.

name: DragonBreathHunter
description: DragonBreathHunter hunts for specific indicators associated with the DragonBreath APT campaign, including RONINGLOADER, Gh0st RAT, and associated Chinese APT tooling.

name: DnsSecure
description: DnsSecure applies comprehensive DNS security hardening including secure resolver configuration, query validation, and DNS cache protection.

name: DNSExfiltrationDetection
description: DNSExfiltrationDetection monitors DNS queries to detect data exfiltration through DNS tunneling, a common technique used by attackers to steal data.

name: DNSDoTDoH
description: DNSDoTDoH configures Windows to use encrypted DNS over TLS (DoT) or DNS over HTTPS (DoH), preventing DNS spoofing and eavesdropping.

name: DLLHijackingDetection
description: DLLHijackingDetection monitors for DLL hijacking attempts where malware places malicious DLLs in application directories to be loaded instead of legitimate system DLLs.

name: DisableTrash
description: DisableTrash provides secure file deletion capabilities and Recycle Bin management to prevent data recovery from deleted files.

name: DevicesFiltering
description: DevicesFiltering provides advanced filtering and monitoring of all hardware devices, including detailed logging and policy enforcement.

name: DeviceFiltering
description: DeviceFiltering controls access to hardware devices by implementing allowlists and blocklists for USB, Bluetooth, and other device types.

name: DebloatPresets
description: DebloatPresets provides pre-configured scripts and settings to remove Windows bloatware, disable unnecessary features, and optimize system performance.

name: DataExfiltrationDetection
description: DataExfiltrationDetection monitors network connections and system activity to detect unauthorized data theft, including large outbound transfers, suspicious uploads, and data staging.

name: CVEMitigationPatcher
description: CVEMitigationPatcher downloads and applies mitigations for known exploited vulnerabilities from the CISA Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (KEV) catalog and other sources.

name: CustomControlsRemover
description: CustomControlsRemover detects and removes malicious custom controls that may be injected into applications or the desktop environment to trick users or capture input.

name: CrudePayloadGuard
description: CrudePayloadGuard detects simple or crude malicious payloads that may be missed by more sophisticated detection engines, including basic droppers and simple malware.

name: Creds
description: Creds provides utilities for secure credential management, storage, and rotation within the security framework.

name: CredentialProtection
description: CredentialProtection provides active, real-time protection against credential theft by monitoring for and blocking unauthorized access to credential stores.

name: CredentialHardening
description: CredentialHardening implements comprehensive credential protection including LSA protection, cached credential clearing, and Credential Guard enablement.

name: CredentialDumpDetection
description: CredentialDumpDetection monitors for credential dumping attempts including LSASS memory access, SAM hive extraction, and known credential theft tool usage.

name: CPythonWrapper
description: CPython Wrapper provides an integration layer for embedding Python functionality into other applications. It enables seamless interaction between Python scripts and native applications.

name: Corrupt
description: Corrupt monitors for corrupted files, tampered system files, and data integrity issues that may indicate malware activity or system compromise.

name: CookieProtection
description: CookieProtection implements security measures to protect browser cookies from theft, manipulation, and unauthorized access by malicious software.

name: CookieMonitor
description: CookieMonitor monitors browser cookies for suspicious activity, session hijacking indicators, and potential security threats stored in cookie data.

name: Consent
description: Consent manages user permissions and consent requirements for security operations, ensuring proper authorization before executing sensitive actions.

name: ComprehensiveScan
description: ComprehensiveScan performs thorough system-wide file scanning using multiple detection engines including hash analysis, entropy calculation, and signature detection.

name: COMMonitoring
description: COMMonitoring detects COM (Component Object Model) object hijacking attempts, a common persistence and privilege escalation technique used by malware.

name: COMList
description: COMList inventories COM (Component Object Model) objects on the system to identify potential attack vectors, hijacking opportunities, and suspicious registrations.

name: CodeInjectionDetection
description: CodeInjectionDetection monitors for process injection techniques including CreateRemoteThread, WriteProcessMemory, VirtualAllocEx, and other code injection methods used by malware.

name: ClipboardMonitoring
description: ClipboardMonitoring monitors the clipboard for sensitive data exposure, detecting passwords, API keys, credit card numbers, and other confidential information that may have been inadvertently copied.

name: CleanGuard
description: CleanGuard aggregates file reputation data from multiple sources to provide comprehensive file verdicts, identifying clean, suspicious, or malicious files through reputation scoring.

name: Certs
description: Certs provides certificate security management including certificate monitoring, untrusted certificate detection, and certificate store hardening.

name: Browsers
description: Browsers provides utilities for managing and securing multiple web browsers simultaneously, including configuration deployment and security policy application.

name: BrowserNetworkGuard
description: BrowserNetworkGuard monitors network connections from browsers, detecting suspicious outbound connections, data exfiltration attempts, and unauthorized communication.

name: BrowserHardening
description: BrowserHardening applies comprehensive security policies to Chrome, Firefox, Edge, and other browsers to enhance security, privacy, and prevent common web-based attacks.

name: BrowserExtensionMonitoring
description: BrowserExtensionMonitoring scans installed browser extensions across Chrome, Firefox, Edge, and other browsers to detect malicious extensions, excessive permissions, and known bad extension IDs.

name: Browser
description: Cheprkach is a custom Windows desktop browser built with WPF and Microsoft WebView2. It provides a modern browsing experience with features like tab management, bookmarks, downloads, ad blocking, extensions support, and cloud synchronization.

name: BootkitRemediation
description: BootkitRemediation detects and removes boot-level malware (bootkits) that infect the Master Boot Record (MBR), Volume Boot Record (VBR), or UEFI firmware.

name: Bios
description: Bios provides tools for verifying BIOS/UEFI security settings, detecting firmware threats, and ensuring secure boot configurations.

name: BFE
description: BFE components monitor and harden the Base Filtering Engine, which provides the underlying platform for Windows Firewall and advanced security filtering.

name: Benchmark
description: Benchmark is a comprehensive system performance testing suite written in PowerShell. It provides detailed performance metrics across all major system components with calibrated scoring for easy comparison.

name: BeaconDetection
description: BeaconDetection monitors network connections for patterns indicative of command and control (C2) beaconing, including regular interval connections, jitter analysis, and data exfiltration patterns.

name: BCDSecurity
description: BCDSecurity applies security hardening to the Boot Configuration Data store to prevent boot-level attacks and unauthorized modifications.

name: BCDCleanupEnhanced
description: BCDCleanupEnhanced provides advanced cleanup of Boot Configuration Data with additional security verification and protection mechanisms.

name: BCDCleanup
description: BCDCleanup scans and removes suspicious entries from the Boot Configuration Data (BCD) store, detecting and removing potential bootkit persistence.

name: Backup
description: Backup provides automated backup capabilities for security configurations, GEDR settings, and other critical security-related files.

name: BabylonianTime
description: BabylonianTime provides an alternative time display using Babylonian sexagesimal (base-60) time divisions for historical and educational purposes.

name: AutorunsStyleLogger
description: AutorunsStyleLogger creates startup and persistence logs in a format compatible with Sysinternals Autoruns for easy analysis and comparison.

name: AutorunsLogIngestion
description: AutorunsLogIngestion processes output from Sysinternals Autoruns tool, normalizing data for SIEM integration and threat analysis.

name: AutorunsEnhanced
description: AutorunsEnhanced provides advanced monitoring of Windows startup locations, scheduled tasks, services, and other persistence mechanisms with enhanced detection of suspicious entries.

name: AutoHotkey
description: AutoHotkey scripts for security-related automation, quick actions, and keyboard shortcuts.

name: AudioEnhancement
description: Audio enhancement components optimized for security alert generation and audio-based threat detection.

name: Audio
description: Audio components for security alert generation and audio-based threat detection.

name: AttackToolsDetection
description: AttackToolsDetection identifies the presence of known penetration testing frameworks, exploitation tools, and attack utilities that may indicate malicious activity.

name: AgentsAntivirus
description: AgentsAntivirus is a modular security framework consisting of 120+ individual PowerShell detection modules. Each agent specializes in a specific threat vector, providing granular, focused protection that can be deployed independently or as part of a coordinated defense strategy. This suite is designed to work alongside the main GEDR platform or ...

name: AdvancedThreatDetection
description: AdvancedThreatDetection monitors for indicators of Advanced Persistent Threats (APTs), including sophisticated attack techniques, living-off-the-land tactics, and indicators associated with known threat actor groups.

name: GorstaksAI
description: Gorstaks AI
